name: Can You Do It - VR Experience

reviews.review_description: With the current state of VR games available this one is pretty much at the bottom of the Barrel. The graphics are a step above Minecraft and the mechanics are jank. The hang gliding is cool but other than that this is junk and I can't recommend it to anyone. This title would need a massive overhaul and complete re design to be enjoyable.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for playing can you di it, vr experience.

reviews.review_description: Never could get the floor in the right place. Looked right when I set it up but once in game it was too low. Made rope crossing weird. Ropes in my chest
I only wanted some functions in The Climb 2. This game satisfied what I wanted.

The overall game idea seems interesting but the actual game itself is somewhat crap, the game looks like a mobile game I would get on a iPhone 5 the detection for when you grab is horrid and the game gets boring extremely fast, there is barely anything to do and in my opinion was a waste of money, a game like this shouldn’t even cost money.
I quite enjoy the game especially climbing, it feels realistic and exiting when you can see how perspectively small you are.

developer_response.body: Thank you much for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: You will put this game away after 15 minutes and never play it again. Very basic, not recommended

developer_response.body:
We will add more experience and features in upcoming updates.
Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: loved all experiences for an affordable cost, I loved gun hunting and climbing. totally worth the game
